dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8419 IH: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 3255 Northwest 94th Avenue in Coral Springs, Florida, as the “Nancy Metayer Post Office Building”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Moskowitz (for himself, Mr. Frost, Mrs. Cherfilus-McCormick, Ms. Wilson of Florida, Ms. Wasserman Schultz, Ms. Castor of Florida, Mr. Soto, Ms. Lois Frankel of Florida, Ms. Salazar, Mr. Donalds, Mrs. Luna, Mr. Mills, and Mr. Diaz-Balart) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 3255 Northwest 94th Avenue in Coral Springs, Florida, as the Nancy Metayer Post Office Building.

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 3255 Northwest 94th Avenue in Coral Springs, Florida, shall be known and designated as the Nancy Metayer Post Office Building.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Nancy Metayer Post Office Building.
